prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、 双一流；软科主榜2026年约第67名，近年排名在54–67之间波动，整体稳定；近年声誉评价中性/混合，无明显负面舆情；抖音热度一般（总排名第68位），短视 频曝光量中等；安全科学与工程A+（全国顶尖）、测绘科学与技术A-、土木工程A-，与该校矿业特色一致，对相关专业报考有吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电气工程、电子信息等热门专业社会热度持续偏高；本省2026年考生总数约53.5万，较2025年物理类+历史类合计约46.3万增长约15.6%，竞争明显加剧；中国矿业大学位于江苏徐州，非本省院校，无显著地域偏好加成。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移后的反弹预期、2026年计划基本 持平、本省考生总数明显增加等因素，预计2026年物理类竞争较2025年略有加剧，位次小幅前移；预测最低位次约26516名，区间26016–27016名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 23044 → 22193 → 19766 → 26637. In 2024, the ranking significantly moved forward, but in 2025 it moved backward by about 6871 places, showing large fluctuations. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 26637. The provincial enrollment plan for Physics Category was 182 in 2022, 199 in 2023, 203 in 2024, and 202 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 203, essentially unchanged from 2025, with only a slight increase of 1 person, indicating minimal expansion.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; on the Soft Science main ranking in 2026 approximately 67th, with recent rankings fluctuating between 54 and 67, overall stable. Recent reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no obvious negative public opinion. Douyin popularity is average (68th overall), with moderate short video exposure. Safety Science and Engineering is A+ (top in the country), Surveying and Mapping Science and Technology is A-, Civil Engineering is A-, consistent with the university's mining characteristics, which is attractive for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, and Electronic Information continue to have high social popularity. In 2026, the total number of examinees in the province is about 535,000, an increase of about 15.6% compared to the total of about 463,000 for Physics and History categories in 2025, indicating significantly intensified competition. China University of Mining and Technology is located in Xuzhou, Jiangsu, not a provincial institution, with no significant regional preference advantage.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the expected rebound after the significant backward shift in 2025 rankings, the essentially unchanged 2026 plan, and the notable increase in the number of provincial examinees, it is predicted that competition in the Physics Category in 2026 will be slightly more intense than in 2025, with rankings moving forward slightly. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 26516, with a range of 26016 to 27016.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:

- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Information Security, Data Science and Big Data Technology)
- Electronic Information Engineering/Automation
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Artificial Intelligence/Robotics Engineering
- Mathematics (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Statistics)
- Mechanical Engineering (Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering, Mechanical Engineering)
- Energy and Power Engineering (Energy Storage Science and Engineering, Energy and Power Engineering)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Safety Science and Engineering (Safety Engineering, Fire Engineering, etc.)
- Mining Engineering (Intelligent Mining Engineering, New Energy Science and Engineering, etc.)
- Surveying and Mapping (Surveying and Mapping Engineering, Geographic Information Science)
- Civil Engineering (Civil Engineering, Engineering Management, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (26016–27016), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 popular majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 characteristic majors as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range, you can focus on aiming for popular majors such as Electrical Engineering and Computer Science.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 4823 → 4205 → 4213 → 4250. Over the past four years, rankings have remained stable between 4200 and 4823, with small fluctuations. The 2025 baseline is about 4250. In 2026, the plan is 24, an increase of 9 from 2025, representing a 60% expansion, significantly easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking around 67th in 2026, stable in recent years; recent reputation evaluation neutral/mixed; Douyin popularity average, no significant negative public opinion; Safety Science and Engineering A+, Surveying and Mapping Science and Technology A-, Civil Engineering A-, mainly engineering-focused, liberal arts majors lack A-class discipline support.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as Law and Chinese Language and Literature have high social popularity, with clear advantages for civil service exams; the province's total number of examinees in 2026 is about 535,000, an increase of about 15.6% from 2025, intensifying competition; the university is located in Xuzhou, Jiangsu, not a provincial institution, with no significant regional preference.

预测结论.text: Considering the long-term stability of History Category rankings, the significant 60% expansion in 2026, and the increase in provincial examinees, it is expected that the 2026 History Category ranking will noticeably shift backward; predicted minimum ranking approximately 5280, range 4780–5780.
